name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 Super
description: The NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 Super is a high-performance, mid-range graphics card based on the Ada Lovelace architecture. It offers exceptional energy efficiency and features 7,168 CUDA cores, 12GB of GDDR6X memory, and DLSS 3 frame generation for maxed-out 1440p gaming.

name: AMD Radeon RX 7800 XT
description: The AMD Radeon RX 7800 XT is a high-performance graphics card built on the RDNA 3 architecture. It is designed for maxed-out 1440p gaming and features 16 GB of GDDR6 memory, AV1 encoding, and hardware raytracing.
